---
title: "GitHub Pages Example"
format: html
---

## Course lessons

- [Intro to Quarto](scripts/intro-quarto.html)
- Intro to git and [GitHub](https://github.com)
- [Cleaning and Wrangling Data](scripts/tidy-and-wrangle.html)
- [Viz](scripts/visualization.html)

## Practice schedule

- Practice I
- Practice II
